name: daily-followup-tracker
description: Daily multi-channel follow-up sweep. Reads the last 24 hours across email, messaging, today's meetings, and the user's task system. Detects open loops the user owes (waiting on user reply) and today's-new commitments the user just made. Drafts the follow-up messages in the user's actual voice and produces a single daily report with drafts ready to copy-send.
